# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next';
import { RawServerResponse } from 'vercel-edge-function-types';

export default async function handler(
  req: NextApiRequest,
  res: NextApiResponse<RawServerResponse>
) {
  const userContent = req.body;
  const headers = Object.fromEntries(req.headers);

  if (!userContent) {
    return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Missing request body' });
  }

  try {
    const readableStream = new ReadableStream({
      pull(controller) {
        controller.enqueue(userContent);
        controller.close();
      },
    });

    const writableStream = res.body;

    await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      readableStream.pipeTo(writableStream);
      writableStream.on('close', resolve);
      writableStream.on('error', reject);
    });

    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(headers)) {
      res.headers[key] = value;
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
    return res.status(500).json({ message: 'Internal Server Error' });
  }

  return { status: 200 };
}
